planner.title: Smart Trip Planner
planner.no_locations: No locations added yet. Search and add locations, or long-press directly on the map to plan your trip.
planner.see_algorithm_tip: See how the algorithm discovers the route
planner.osrm_warning_desc: This route is outside the loaded local map. Using OSRM fallback; toll/fuel optimization might not be fully accurate.

settings.title: Settings
settings.criterion_distance_desc: Prioritizes the shortest route in kilometers.
settings.criterion_time_desc: Prioritizes the fastest route in time.
settings.criterion_smart_desc: Smart balance between cost and time savings.
settings.criterion_toll_desc: Avoids toll roads as much as possible.
settings.criterion_tip: Defines what the algorithm should prioritize minimizing.
settings.fuel_consumption_tip: Your vehicle's average consumption to estimate trip costs.
settings.fuel_price_tip: Price per liter used for fuel budget calculations.
settings.toll_price_tip: Estimated rate per kilometer on toll road sections.
settings.time_value_tip: Adjust to decide if saving time is worth the financial cost (tolls/fuel).
settings.fuel_type_tip: Select your fuel type to fetch current average prices.

analysis.title: Analysis
analysis.modal_desc: Detailed analysis of the optimal route between all selected locations
analysis.matrix_desc: The distance matrix shows the distance (in km) between each pair of locations.
analysis.reason_1_desc: The route was calculated using a combination of Dijkstra's algorithm and optimization heuristics.
analysis.reason_2_desc: Out of all possible combinations, this is the shortest path found.
analysis.reason_3_desc: Each segment is optimized using real-world road distances.

debug.title: Routing Engine Debug Data
debug.desc: Detailed analysis of the weights and segments used for the current route.

notifications.location_added_desc: {{name}} has been added to your trip.
notifications.location_removed_desc: {{name}} has been removed from your trip.
notifications.export_desc: Your route data has been downloaded as JSON.
notifications.not_enough_desc: Please add at least two locations to calculate a route.
notifications.search_error_desc: Failed to search locations. Please try again.
notifications.route_calculated_desc: Optimal route found based on {{criterion}} using {{engine}} engine.
notifications.calculation_error_desc: Failed to calculate the optimal route. Please try again.
notifications.route_cleared_desc: The current route has been cleared.
